seo.title: PagePilot Starter | Website Landing Page
seo.description: A black and white placeholder landing page for an AI-maintainable Astro site kit.

sections.headline: Website landing page
sections.subheadline: This starter page is intentionally plain, with image placeholders and editable content blocks ready to replace.

items.title: Clear structure
items.description: Use this section for a concise benefit or service highlight.

items.title: Easy editing
items.description: Update the copy from structured content files with agent guidance.

items.title: Placeholder media
items.description: Swap the gray image blocks when the real brand assets are ready.

sections.headline: About product
sections.body: Describe the offer, product, venue, or service here. The grayscale image blocks are placeholders, so the site owner can quickly see what still needs real photography or artwork.

sections.headline: Ready to customize this page?
sections.body: Replace the starter copy, update the navigation, add real images, and run the PagePilot check before publishing.
